text: The system shall provide a standardized interface to unify a multitude of social networks.
The system shall allow users to schedule campaign events to be distributed to social networks.
The system shall provide a plugin-based architecture for abstracting services behind a single facade.
The system shall allow users to view social networking messages directed at them.
The system shall allow users to perform data mining tasks on social networks.
The system shall allow the use of external authentication modules for user login.
The system shall provide an internal authentication mechanism.
The system shall include a web client interface to interact with campaigns.
The system shall interface with a database for storage and retrieval of account and campaign data.
The system shall provide a monitoring dashboard to view responses to campaign content.
The system shall include an explore view to monitor topics of interest in social media.
The Mashbot server shall run on hardware capable of connecting to the Internet as a server.
The Mashbot server shall be capable of interfacing with modern database software.
The Mashbot server shall require no greater than 1 gigabyte of RAM memory.
The web client shall require no more than 256 megabytes of RAM.
The system shall encrypt data between the web client and the server using TLS.
The system shall send emails using SMTP.
The system shall allow for the creation of new user accounts.
The system shall require a username for new user account creation.
The system shall require a password for new user account creation.
The system shall require a name for new user account creation.
The system shall require an email address for new user account creation.
The system shall allow users to modify their own password, email address, and name.
The system shall allow for the deactivation of user accounts.
The system shall deny access to deactivated users.
The system shall only allow users to change their own passwords.
The system shall support campaigns consisting of a name, pieces of content, and a schedule.
The system shall support text and image content types for campaigns.
The system shall allow the association of Mashbot accounts with external service accounts.
The system shall allow for the backup of the data system to non-volatile storage.
The system shall allow only valid users to log into the system.
The system shall allow the System Administrator to configure a session timeout.
The system shall allow users to drag items to a calendar to schedule content.
The system shall allow users to set up monitored searches for services supporting keyword search APIs.
